Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Brian McMahon
Message:
feat(auth): cut over to the shared nousergon-auth identity service (metron-ops#179)

Metron no longer runs Better Auth in-process. Sign-in, sessions, and the
invite gate live on the shared service (auth.nousergon.ai); Metron's
FastAPI verifies the short-lived EdDSA JWTs it mints against its JWKS and
resolves the `sub` claim to a workspace via users.identity_user_id
(match -> one-time email link -> JIT-provision, mirroring vires-PR97).

Backend:
- api/services/auth_jwt.py: JWKS verifier (EdDSA pinned, exp/iss/aud
  enforced, PyJWKClient-cached — no per-request round-trip).
- api/services/identity.py: resolution ladder + require_tenant_id
  dependency. Replaces the blind-trust X-Tenant-Id stub in
  portfolios.py::_tenant_id: bearer is authoritative (invalid -> 401,
  never a fallthrough); X-Tenant-Id survives ONLY for the fixed demo
  tenant id while DEMO_ENABLED (the signup-free read-only demo has no
  session); anything else -> 401.
- api/routers/me.py: GET /me echoes the resolved tenant — the
  deploy-verification chokepoint.
- models.User.identity_user_id (nullable, unique, indexed; additive).
- tests/test_auth_jwt.py: end-to-end coverage with real Ed25519
  signatures (only the JWKS fetch stubbed); feature tests override the
  auth seam with the legacy header stub via dependency_overrides.

Web:
- Delete web/lib/auth.ts, invite-gate.ts, email.ts, the /api/auth/*
  handler (all centralized in nousergon-auth); drop better-sqlite3 +
  resend deps and the auth env vars.
- lib/session.ts: getSession() fetches the shared get-session;
  requireApiAuth() mints the identity JWT (demo cookie -> demo tenant
  id; else redirect to /login). requireTenantId/tenantId renamed to
  requireApiAuth/apiAuth everywhere — the value is a credential now,
  not a tenant id.
- lib/api.ts: X-Tenant-Id replaced by Authorization: Bearer (demo
  credential keeps the header); cacheIdentity() gives unstable_cache
  keyParts/tags a STABLE per-identity key (JWT sub / demo id) so cache
  hits and tag revalidation survive token rotation.
- auth-forms.tsx: magic link against the shared service with required
  metadata.product ("metron") + optional inviteCode; absolute
  callbackURL (verify happens on the auth origin).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
